successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.service.ts exists and exports BalanceService class implementing LeaveBalanceService interface with methods: getBalance, updateBalance, createBalance, getBalancesByEmployee, recalculateBalance

src/modules/policy/policy.service.ts exists and exports PolicyService class implementing LeavePolicyService interface with methods: getPolicy, getActivePolicies, getPolicyByLeaveType, validateRequest, checkEligibility
src/modules/balance/balance.service.test.ts exists with comprehensive Vitest tests covering all BalanceService methods
src/modules/policy/policy.service.test.ts exists with comprehensive Vitest tests covering all PolicyService methods

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces (ILeaveBalanceRepository, ILeavePolicyRepository, IEmployeeRepository, ILeaveAuditRepository)
Audit records: BalanceService.updateBalance must write an audit record via ILeaveAuditRepository
Input validation: Validate all inputs at service method boundaries before processing
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data in service methods
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
BalanceService.updateBalance must execute balance update and audit log creation atomically in a single database transaction
PolicyService.checkEligibility must validate employee employment status and probation period
All method signatures must match the declared interfaces exactly with proper TypeScript types
Dependency direction: services depend on repository interfaces, not implementations
outOfScope: Notification service and integration (deferred to Phase 7)
API controllers and Fastify routes (deferred to Phase 8)
Balance and Policy API controllers (deferred to Phase 9)
Notification controller and cross-cutting concerns (deferred to Phase 10)
